name: Manda Duo
short_description: Experience the thrill of fast-paced endless platforming combined with first-person shooting! Whether you’re taking on the challenge solo or teaming up with a friend, you’ll enjoy the excitement of this game.
detailed_description:
Manda Duo” is an innovative two-player cooperative game about surviving on dangerous planets.

You will strive to survive on a dangerous planet in the form of an infinite platform and first-person shooting.

Whether you take on the challenge solo or team up with friends, you'll enjoy the action-packed and dangerous fun of this game.

Control  the boy:  Move and jump on constantly falling platforms. Don't fall off!

Play as the girl: Aim and shoot. Heal the boy with your healing gun and fend off airborne enemies with your rifle.

Face various randomly appearing dangers, test your reflexes and strategy, and survive as long as you can.

Can't handle it alone? Grab your friends and fight together!

——————————————————————————————————————

Game Features:

  • Smooth controls with small jumps, high jumps, wall slides, and wall jumps!

  • Procedurally generated random worlds: Where will the next foothold be? Who knows!

  • Unknown dangers: Is it a swarm of birds or a sudden gust of wind?

  • Upgrade! Upgrade!: Collect coins to upgrade your attributes in the shop, making the game easier.
